task_completion.description: Build at least 4 new partition walls to separate the areas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan or 3D view in Sweet Home 3D. There should be at least 4 newly drawn wall segments dividing the original empty shell into multiple distinct areas.

task_completion.description: Install at least 3 doors to allow access between the partitioned zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan or 3D view. There should be at least 3 door objects placed within the interior partition walls connecting the different zones.

task_completion.description: Define room boundaries for all 4 zones ('Wet Lab', 'Gowning Room', 'Equipment Room', 'Write-up Area') and apply a distinct floor color or texture to at least 2 of them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, there should be 4 defined rooms (indicated by room area shading and labels like 'Wet Lab', 'Gowning Room', etc.). In the 3D view or 2D plan, at least 2 of these rooms must have a distinct floor color or texture applied to them.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Wet Lab with at least 6 tables/desks and 2 sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Wet Lab zone, look for at least 6 table or desk objects (serving as lab benches) and at least 2 sink objects visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Equipment Room with at least 4 shelves/cabinets and 2 refrigerators.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Equipment Room zone, look for at least 4 shelf or cabinet objects and at least 2 refrigerator objects visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Write-up Area with at least 3 desks, 3 office chairs, and 3 computers/laptops.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Write-up Area zone, look for at least 3 desk objects, 3 office chair objects, and 3 computer or laptop objects visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Draw at least 2 dimension lines between the laboratory benches in the Wet Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, look for at least 2 dimension lines (lines with arrows at the ends and measurement numbers in the middle) drawn specifically between the tables/desks in the Wet Lab area.

integrity.description: Agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application interface being used, with items selected from the built-in catalog and placed in the workspace.

integrity.description: Agent placed actual 3D models and walls rather than drawing 2D shapes or text over the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The placed walls, doors, and furniture should appear in the lower 3D view pane of Sweet Home 3D, demonstrating they are genuine 3D objects.

integrity.description: Agent built upon the provided empty commercial building shell.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outer boundary walls of the building should match the original pre-drafted shell, with only interior modifications made.
